textByHashes.8cd77e0514a18eb79980f27ea7331e7523fb7990: Ah, look what we have here, Will! This looks like someone who needs a good job!
textByHashes.b4e1863335b104e69ab3e286946c0eac96188dde: Alas! We are sadly not currently in a place where we can take on any more staff, but let us hope that changes soon!
textByHashes.21674b3df9cb52743c337412a082a5c1d438e383: Well, let's not waste any more time! Stranger, are you ready for your interview?
textByHashes.fecd9e70e41939c2f21be26edb3e993c5827d4ef: Pleased to meet you, . I'm Anne, and this is Will.
textByHashes.04b105077bb54b7c60e91012109c3e4f6bc05ea0: Will, it's important we not be too picky! It's a competitive market, after all.
textByHashes.7e6f2c5d06feff2bcd05f9da7ed18b10d6758571: Just let us know when you're ready, and we'll hop aboard!
textByHashes.0d2ee91317538465d9240fbc186323fcbff4b142: Ah, there you are! Time to get on with your interview!
textByHashes.bb1e5dc1627c2149b62d5de8bdd15f49e9f6ee9c: Ah, there you are, . Are you ready to hop aboard our ship?
textByHashes.7b9228c0fe20e16da2197a74c2836e3e7645a249: Well, good news, , because that's where you come in! You're our new helm!
textByHashes.1b86dabbbe2c468e4ecccb76cdc8328634fbb3b2: Well, we all have to start somewhere!
textByHashes.eed514cd0a4174c71459381bebec41a67cf9fac9: Have you never been? It's a great place for a drink! We'll have to take you there!
textByHashes.7270b187736151b24a471d059791a8b046df31b1: Over to you, ! Take the helm when ready.
textByHashes.2d58cf9ddf4befa90180c01d0cf6195b65b1f2ba: This is your bit, ! Take the helm when ready.
textByHashes.28b8bffa0a6d86223916117a995e3017022e99a0: This isn't the can-do attitude we need, , but fine, we'll go back...
textByHashes.0f383158dd0bd30ad4ef08c874d235e0ea701f09: Hello there, . Shall we hop back aboard our ship?
textByHashes.3321753ff43eba149c3f1d4f7f1f3ed425c66ff5: We need to be going south.
textByHashes.f39bdae2e58caf82979b05ee58489e6d642ad798: We need to be going north.
textByHashes.1f5089ddc297452a3ba5e2cbf828ce26369bd897: We need to be going east.
textByHashes.5e55339021f7f8dc1d843c268def08a3ff1150d1: We need to be going west.
textByHashes.f7084ce8eacf9cc523159506724cd20d92df2cb0: You need to head south west.
textByHashes.e9e150e7dd748411514ec4d83857b9106dead388: You need to head south east.
textByHashes.76aa7c86520a9f60e8cc8f44e761bcaeb32a33d9: You need to head north west.
textByHashes.ad5061c839fa74132aa09bb328f8f8675658568d: You need to head north east.
textByHashes.940fb76a56e543d33c82f039365920005819ab99: You need to trim the sails, ! We need to catch that wind!
textByHashes.564ea245b7f13528e2bfda9eade2300c860fd04a: ! The sails need trimming! Don't miss out on that wind!
textByHashes.34b1f29588a6dd21c53e9efbad68cc6c5b8fde2c: When you're ready, , just lower the salvaging hook and let's see what we can find!
textByHashes.42e196d8120be014281fad21042d2779bd3d10f5: That's right! Think of what you'll learn today!
textByHashes.d080d76679baff721d1b5d319e905320705db0ec: Time for some salvaging, ! When you're ready, just lower the salvaging hook and let's see what we can find!
textByHashes.fceb1317752293576949f9114cb49892e81f125f: That's right! And now that we've found it, I'm afraid we don't really need you anymore.
textByHashes.b59ca74593e6fd90a5532351ed650ae5fe8c0175: Sorry, . If it's any consolation, you did a great job! Unfortunately, we just have to let you go.
